hero.name: Arjun Gopinath
hero.title: Senior Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Engineer with 5 years building scalable, data-intensive products across fintech and healthcare. Strong in React, TypeScript, and frontend architecture — with hands-on backend experience in Node.js and Python. Track record of owning features end to end, collaborating across product and engineering teams, and delivering AI-powered solutions.

jobs.title: Ransky Tech
responsibilities: Built trading dashboards in React and TypeScript that pulled live data from multiple exchange APIs — normalizing formats across sources and keeping rendering fast enough for real-time P&L tracking.
Coded Node.js and Python services to automate daily report generation — traders were reconciling data manually before this, which took hours each day.
Worked directly with backend engineers to define API contracts, then took full ownership of the frontend implementation through to delivery.

jobs.title: Thoughtworks
responsibilities: Led frontend development of a Clinical Study Report generation platform for a global pharmaceutical client — React with CKEditor for rich document authoring, FastAPI backend integrated with LLM and RAG pipelines for document intelligence and structured report generation from unstructured clinical inputs.

Built a workflow management platform for a leading management consulting firm, React frontend with FastAPI backend, enabling structured study and process management across complex multi-stakeholder user flows.
Mentored client team members and junior developers through pair programming and code reviews, advocating TDD and simple design, measurably reducing deployment friction.

jobs.title: Thoughtworks
responsibilities: Migrated a legacy AngularJS codebase to React + TypeScript Micro Frontends using Module Federation — enabling seamless coexistence of Angular and React at runtime so the migration could happen incrementally; built a reusable front-end component library adopted across multiple product teams, eliminating duplicated UI work and standardising design patterns.
Worked closely with backend engineers on Spring Boot services — involved in API contract design, JWT auth setup, and debugging RabbitMQ integrations alongside the backend team.

list.name: Financial Reporting Platform
list.description: Real-time trading dashboard for P&L, balances, and fees across exchanges — with automated daily report generation replacing manual reconciliation.

list.name: Clinical Study Report
list.description: React and FastAPI application integrating LLM and RAG pipelines to generate structured clinical study reports from unstructured medical inputs for a global pharmaceutical client.

list.name: Chatbot for Admin Console
list.description: Conversational assistant built with agentic and deterministic Temporal workflows — helps users navigate admin consoles interactively using LLM and RAG.

list.name: Swarm Intel
list.description: Multi-agent research swarm built for the Microsoft Build AI Hackathon. Dispatches 5 specialized AI agents in parallel to research any company — news, financials, LinkedIn, GitHub, and regulatory — then validates and synthesizes findings into a structured due diligence report.

list.name: Bahmni Open Source (EMR)
list.description: Feature contributions across the React frontend and Spring Boot backend for Bahmni's open-source EHR platform — i18n, JWT auth improvements, RabbitMQ integrations, and release coordination.

list.name: Captain's Wheel
list.description: A fast-paced casino-themed browser game built with Phaser 3. Spin the wheel, match the suit, beat the house.

list.name: Portfolio Website
list.description: This site — designed and developed from scratch with React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

contact.heading: Contact Me
contact.description: You can reach out to me via LinkedIn or drop me a mail directly.
